items.description: Pendant Necklace with adjustable chain, pendant; designed for 日常佩戴, 禮物送禮. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 吊墜項鍊，特色：adjustable chain、pendant；適用於日常佩戴、禮物送禮。風格安全、實穿多變。
